title: Gou Tanabe Launches Manga of H.P. Lovecraft's The Case of Charles Dexter Ward Novella
content: Manga creator Gou Tanabe launched a manga adaptation of H.P. Lovecraft 's The Case of Charles Dexter Ward ( Charles Ward no Kikai na Jiken ) horror novella in Kadokawa 's KadoComi website (under the Comic Beam label) on April 1.
author: ANN

title: 10 Best Anime to Watch on Netflix in May 2026
content: As the exciting April 2026 draws near its end, Netflix is all set for its May lineup. The platform will confirm the return of some of the biggest anime ever, including Assassination Classroom and Jujutsu Kaisen Season 2, which weren’t available in the U.S library.
author: ComicBook

title: Live-Action GTO: Great Teacher Onizuka Show Gets New Series in July
content: Fuji TV and Kansai TV announced on Thursday that they are producing a new live-action series based on Tohru Fujisawa 's GTO: Great Teacher Onizuka manga that will premiere on Kansai TV , Fuji TV , and affiliated channels on July 20 at 10:00 p.m. (9:00 a.m. EDT).
author: ANN

title: Netflix’s Best Sports Anime of 2025 Achieves Major Box Office Milestone
content: Based on Uoto’s acclaimed manga, the anime film adaptation of 100 Meters hit Japanese theaters in September 2025 and became a massive hit. The manga was serialized from 2018 to 2019, but never received the global recognition it deserved.
author: ComicBook

title: 5 Years Laters, Bungo Stray Dogs Confirms a Major Return Ahead of Season 6
content: Bungo Stray Dogs is an acclaimed supernatural action series written by Kafka Asagiri and illustrated by Sango Harukawa. The manga began serializing in 2012 in Kadokawa Shoten’s Young Ace magazine and was later adapted into an anime by Studio Bones, almost four years after the manga’s debut.
author: ComicBook

title: 5 Anime With 100+ Episodes That Are Worth Watching From Start to Finish
content: Anime with more than 100 episodes are a big time commitment, but some of them are worth watching all the way through — even if they have a bit of filler mixed in. There are plenty of popular anime that cross the 100-episode mark, but not all of them warrant a complete binge.
author: ComicBook

title: Seven Seas Licenses The Villainous Noble is Way Too Fond of MILF Heroines, 6 More Titles
content: Seven Seas Entertainment announced the following licenses on Wednesday: Title: I Wish I Could Meet You Again on the Hill Where That Flower Blooms audiobook Creator(s): Natsue Shiomi (narrated by Mirai ) Release Date: June 4 (Siren imprint) Summary: Kano Yuri is tired of her stifling, directionless life.
author: ANN

title: Always a Catch! Anime Casts Daiki Hamano, Wataru Komada
content: The staff for the television anime of Mayo Momoyo 's Always a Catch! ( Nigashita Sakana wa Ōkikatta ga Tsuriageta Sakana ga Ōkisugita Ken ) light novel series announced two new cast members on Thursday. Daiki Hamano plays Goffredo (left in image above), and Wataru Komada plays Macchio (right above).
author: ANN

title: Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds Game Releases Like a Dragon's Majima Free DLC
content: Sega announced on Tuesday that it will add the free DLC content of Goro Majima as Captain Majima from Like a Dragon: Pirate Yakuza in Hawaii to its Sonic Racing CrossWorlds racing game on Wednesday at 8:00 p.m. EDT.
author: ANN

title: The Ayakashi Hunter's Tainted Bride Gets 2nd Manga Spinoff on May 26
content: The June issue of Kodansha 's Monthly Shonen Sirius magazine revealed on April 24 that Tsugaru Toba and Sen Izumino will launch a short manga spinoff of Midori Yūma 's The Ayakashi Hunter's Tainted Bride ( Kizumono no Hanayome ) novels titled Kōtō Onmyō Gakkō Kizumono no Hanayome Gaiden (Imperial City Onmyo School:…
author: ANN
